evals.prompt: new dev starting monday — spin up a scratch org for them with our source, the Sales_User permset, and the sample data plan in data/sample-data-plan.json
evals.expected_output: Create from the project definition file, deploy source, assign permset, import tree data, open org; sensible alias and duration

evals.prompt: sf org create scratch is failing with a limit error and I can't make new orgs anymore, what do I do
evals.expected_output: Checks ActiveScratchOrgs/DailyScratchOrgs via sf limits api display on the Dev Hub, lists and deletes expired/unused orgs

evals.prompt: I changed a validation rule and a page layout in the scratch org UI, and also edited two classes locally — now push says there are conflicts. help me not lose either side
evals.expected_output: Uses deploy/retrieve preview to inspect both sides, then targeted retrieve of the declarative changes before pushing local code; explains --ignore-conflicts direction semantics
